deploy.startCommand: npx prisma generate && node -e "const{PrismaClient}=require('@prisma/client');const bcrypt=require('bcryptjs');const prisma=new PrismaClient();bcrypt.hash('CHANGE_ME_ON_FIRST_LOGIN',12).then(h=>prisma.user.upsert({where:{email:'admin@palstyle48.com'},update:{password:h,loginAttempts:0,lockUntil:null},create:{email:'admin@palstyle48.com',password:h,name:'Admin palstyle48',role:'admin'}})).then(u=>{console.log('[Boot] Admin ready:',u.email);return prisma.$disconnect();}).catch(e=>{console.error('[Boot] Admin reset failed:',e.message);process.exit(1);})" && node src/index.js
